description: 自主发起对话请求
evidence_snippet: export async function initiateChat(params: { matchScore, sourceAgentId, targetAgentId, sourceUserId, targetUserId, config, customGoal }): Promise<ChatSession> { const sessionId = `dating-chat-${uuidv4()}`; const openingLine = generateOpeningLine({...}); const goals: ChatGoal[] = [...]; ...sessionStore.set(sessionId, session); }
notes: initiateChat() implements Agent autonomously initiating chat using matchScore + opening line generator. Session is stored, goals/highlights extracted.

description: 同时与多个候选保持独立对话
evidence_snippet: const sessionStore = new Map<string, ChatSession>(); ... export function getActiveChatsForUser(userId): ChatSession[] { return Array.from(sessionStore.values()).filter(s => s.sourceUserId === userId || s.targetUserId === userId); }
notes: Each session keyed by uuid; multiple concurrent sessions supported per user via Map storage; getActiveChatsForUser returns concurrent active chats. Combined with Socket.io rooms (each session uses session:{id} room in dialogHandler).

description: Agent 自主决定与符合条件的候选发起对话
evidence_snippet: recommendationService.generateDailyRecommendations() + matchAlgorithm.MatchScore -> agentInitiatedChat.initiateChat(matchScore, ...)
notes: Recommendation pipeline produces ranked candidates with MatchScore; initiateChat consumes them to autonomously open conversation.

description: 异常：对方拒绝对话、同时对话数过多
evidence_snippet: completeChat(sessionId, outcome: 'success'|'no_interest'|'timeout'); const MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER = parseInt(process.env.SOCKET_MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER || '5', 10);
notes: Reject path exists via completeChat outcomes; connection limits enforced. No explicit per-Agent concurrent-chat cap with backpressure messaging found.

description: 四人群聊界面
evidence_snippet: if (type === ChatRoomType.QUAD && participantIds.length !== 4) { throw new Error('Quad room must have exactly 4 participants'); }
notes: ChatRoomType.QUAD enum + invariant of exactly 4 participants. UI screen MatchSuccessScreen.tsx exists in mobile dating screens.

description: 双方接受引荐后进入四人群聊
evidence_snippet: import { createHumanChatRoom } from './humanChatRoomService'; ... mutual_accept => chatRoomId returned
notes: referralService.createReferral + decision flow yields mutual_accept which triggers createHumanChatRoom and returns chatRoomId.

description: 异常：成员离线、消息丢失
evidence_snippet: if (!online) { member.lastSeenAt = new Date(); } ... pingTimeout: 60000, pingInterval: 25000
notes: Online/offline tracking present, heartbeat configured. No explicit offline-message replay queue found in this code path; relies on persistent ChatRoom + DB storage.

description: 在匹配列表页或四人群聊中可随时退出
evidence_snippet: registerRoomHandlers handles room:create, room:join + leave; roomService.joinRoom/leaveRoom present
notes: Room handler supports join/leave events; mobile screens contain dating recommendation/match screens with exit affordances.

description: Agent 礼貌结束对话
evidence_snippet: export async function completeChat(sessionId, outcome: 'success'|'no_interest'|'timeout'): Promise<ChatSession>
notes: completeChat exists with outcome enum, but no explicit polite-farewell message generation observed.

description: 用户在匹配过程中随时退出
evidence_snippet: socket.on('disconnect') -> connectionManager.removeConnection + connectionService.unregisterConnection
notes: Disconnect lifecycle cleanly removes user from rooms via socket/index.ts disconnect handler.

description: 异常：频繁退出加入
evidence_snippet: function checkConnectionLimits(userId): ... if (userConnections >= MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER) { return { allowed: false, reason: ... }; }
notes: Per-user connection limits exist but no explicit rate-limit on rapid join/leave cycles.

description: Socket.io 服务器搭建、命名空间设计
evidence_snippet: Namespaces: /, /chat, /user, /handoff, /system, /group, /room, /negotiation, /presence, /dialog, /matchSubscriptions; Redis adapter wired; ping/timeout configured
notes: Comprehensive namespace setup including /chat, /presence, /dialog as required by playbook.

description: 连接认证：JWT/权限/身份绑定
evidence_snippet: const decoded = await jwtService.verifyToken(token); const [roles, permissions] = await Promise.all([rbacService.getUserRoles(...), rbacService.getUserPermissions(...)]); socket.user = {id, email, roles, permissions}; socket.join(`user:${decoded.userId}`);
notes: JWT verification, RBAC roles/permissions, user-room binding all implemented.

description: 连接生命周期：建立/断开/心跳/重连
evidence_snippet: pingTimeout: 60000, pingInterval: 25000, connectTimeout: 45000; socket.on('disconnect', reason => connectionManager.removeConnection(socketId))
notes: Heartbeat config + disconnect cleanup + connectionManager tracking lastPingAt/lastActivityAt.

description: 房间管理：创建销毁/加入离开/广播/成员查询
evidence_snippet: room:create, room:join (with password+ban check), roomService.createRoom/joinRoom/isUserInRoom/getRoom
notes: Full lifecycle handlers (create/join/leave/broadcast/query). Has unit tests in socket/__tests__/roomHandler.test.ts.

description: Agent 被联系后评估是否值得交流
evidence_snippet: matchAlgorithm scoring + qualityScore on ConversationRoom; Agent decides via matchScore threshold
notes: Quality/match scoring infrastructure exists. Explicit accept/reject-on-contact decision not found as a discrete flow.

description: 评估是否值得交流
evidence_snippet: qualityScore field + threshold (0.6 default) used for room assessments
notes: Worth-engaging evaluation via match score threshold; not surfaced as Agent-side accept dialog.

description: 向主人汇报对话进展
evidence_snippet: conversationReportService generates summary/report for owner; tests in __tests__/conversationReportService.test.ts
notes: Dedicated conversation report service exists with tests.

description: 异常：大量 Agent 同时联系
evidence_snippet: MAX_TOTAL_CONNECTIONS=10000, MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER=5; checkConnectionLimits returns reason if exceeded
notes: Connection-level limits exist; no explicit Agent-level priority queue based on credit/match-score for rate limiting found.

description: 实时分析对方意图和态度
evidence_snippet: DialogMessage.metadata: { intent, confidence, contextSummary }; intent extracted per message in dialog session
notes: Intent + confidence metadata present in DialogMessage; agentDialogService implements intent recognition with tests.

description: 发送策略建议、风险提示、话题推荐
evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory: sharedInterests, discussedTopics, highlights, connectionPoints, redFlags
notes: Topic recommendations + redFlags (risk hints) tracked in ConversationMemory.

description: 提供一键采纳
evidence_snippet: QuickReply React component: onSelect(reply) callback fires on TouchableOpacity click; supports custom replies
notes: Mobile QuickReply component implements one-tap adoption.

description: Agent 实时分析对话，向主人发送私下建议
evidence_snippet: emitToUser(userId, event, data) emits to user:${userId} room across namespaces — used for owner-only private advice
notes: Private channel infrastructure (per-user room) supports owner-only push of advice.

description: 异常：建议为空、AI 服务降级
evidence_snippet: Resilience layer with circuit breaker and template fallback; tested in resilience.test.ts
notes: Circuit breaker + fallback template responses implemented.

description: Agent 提供交友话题建议
evidence_snippet: ConversationTopic: { id, name, category: 'icebreaker'|'interest'|'value'|'lifestyle'|'deep', relevanceScore, questions[], explored }
notes: Categorized topic system for dating conversations with relevance scoring.

description: 评估匹配度是否达到引荐阈值
evidence_snippet: highMatchThreshold: 80; matchScore.totalScore >= highMatchThreshold triggers pause for user input/referral
notes: Threshold-based referral trigger present (80 default).

description: 匹配度达标后请求主人确认引荐
evidence_snippet: createReferral(request) -> referralStore.set(referral.id, referral); sendReferralNotification(...)
notes: Referral creation + push notification flow implemented.

description: 异常：引荐请求超时、一方接受一方拒绝
evidence_snippet: result: 'pending'|'mutual_accept'|'single_accept'|'mutual_reject'|'single_reject'; timeoutHours param
notes: Both single-accept (one rejects) and timeout supported.

description: 记录成功匹配的共同特征
evidence_snippet: LearnedPreferences: { weights, skipReasonWeights, preferredScoreRange, dimensionAdjustments, learningVersion }
notes: Preference learning with weights + skip reasons + dimension adjustments based on feedback.

description: 分析失败对话原因
evidence_snippet: SKIP_REASON_KEYS: NOT_MY_TYPE, TOO_FAR, DIFFERENT_GOALS, NOT_ACTIVE_ENOUGH, INCOMPLETE_PROFILE, OTHER
notes: Failure-reason taxonomy with weight learning.

description: 学习主人决策偏好
evidence_snippet: LearningInput: { userId, feedbacks: FeedbackRecord[] } -> updates SimilarityWeights per user
notes: Per-user preferences learned from feedback history.

description: 用户在四人群聊中切换亲自聊和让 Agent 代聊
evidence_snippet: Dedicated /handoff namespace + registerHandoffHandlers; tested in handoffHandler.test.ts
notes: Human-agent handoff namespace and handlers implemented with tests.

description: 点击让 Agent 聊后 Agent 以自己名义发言
evidence_snippet: MessageSender = 'agent' | 'user' | 'system'; senderType + senderName fields; metadata.agentType
notes: Sender type clearly distinguishes agent vs user; agentName + agentType metadata used in messages.

description: Agent 实时向用户发送私聊建议，仅自己可见
evidence_snippet: emitToUser only emits to room `user:${userId}` — isolation by socket room ensures only owner receives
notes: Per-user private room isolation prevents leak to other side.

description: 私聊建议显示在侧边栏或独立区域
evidence_snippet: QuickReply component renders horizontal scroll of replies — independent UI region from main message bubble area
notes: Dedicated UI component for advice/quick replies.

description: 建议包括话题推荐、风险提示、对方意图分析
evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory.redFlags + ConversationTopic[] + DialogMessage.metadata.intent/confidence
notes: All three categories represented in data structures.

description: 可一键采用建议
evidence_snippet: onSelect: (reply: QuickReplyItem) => void; TouchableOpacity onPress={() => onSelect(reply)}
notes: Same as AS-008-AC-3.

description: 异常：建议泄露、建议为空
evidence_snippet: user:${userId} room ensures isolation; templateResponseService provides fallback for empty
notes: Privacy via room isolation; fallback templates for empty advice.

description: 符合条件的照片推荐给用户确认
evidence_snippet: PhotoUploadService + ImageSecurityService scan + UploadResult.securityCheck
notes: Photo upload + security check exist; explicit recommendation-then-confirm flow not strongly evidenced.

description: 系统扫描本地相册并推荐匹配照片
evidence_snippet: albumClustering, imageSemanticSearch, imageIndexing services for album processing
notes: Album clustering and semantic search infrastructure for photo recommendation.

description: 双方 Agent 和用户在四人群聊中协商薪资
evidence_snippet: MarketData + jobSeekerProfile (expectedMin/Max) + employerProfile (budgetMin/Max, flexibilityScore) + NegotiationStrategy with bottomLine/targetAmount
notes: Salary negotiation service models seeker bottomLine, employer budget, market data, and strategy.

description: Agent 与商家 Agent 谈判争取更好优惠
evidence_snippet: ConsumerProfile + MerchantProfile + MerchantOffer (with hiddenBenefits, exclusions) + agent-to-agent negotiation flow
notes: Full agent negotiation service with merchant/consumer profiles + dedicated socket namespace.

description: 引擎实现：上下文管理/意图识别/回复生成/对话状态/多轮对话
evidence_snippet: DialogContext: { topic, goals, constraints, relevantHistory, sharedKnowledge, negotiationState: { currentRound, agreedTerms, pendingIssues }, matchingCriteria }
notes: Comprehensive context+state model; tested in agentDialogService.test.ts.

description: 人格系统：人格定义/语气/行为/角色/一致性
evidence_snippet: AgentPersona: { name, role, personality[], goals[], communicationStyle: 'formal'|'casual'|'friendly'|'professional', specializations[] }
notes: Persona model with style and consistency. datingConversationService also enforces personaConsistencyThreshold (0.8).

description: 协商机制：双向对话/条件协商/匹配意愿/分歧/共识
evidence_snippet: NegotiationStrategy { approach: 'collaborative'|'competitive'|'compromising'|'accommodating', bottomLine, targetAmount }; CounterOffer flow
notes: Full negotiation framework w/ consensus & counter-offer mechanics; tests exist.

description: 记忆系统：短期/长期/关键提取/摘要/检索增强
evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory: { sharedInterests, discussedTopics, highlights, connectionPoints, redFlags }; relevantHistory in DialogContext
notes: Short-term (relevantHistory), long-term (preference learning), summary (conversationReport).

description: 切换机制：人工介入/切换/上下文移交/状态同步/恢复
evidence_snippet: Dedicated /handoff namespace; handoffHandler.test.ts validates handoff flow
notes: Handoff system implemented with tests.

description: API 实现：对话 API/流式响应/WebSocket/历史查询/参数配置
evidence_snippet: /dialog namespace + dialogHandler join_session/new_message/typing/session_state events; llmService for generation
notes: WebSocket dialog handlers + LLM service routing with parameters.
